creator: blog.antnsn.dev

evidence.text: It’s a tool for making the team smarter every week. The difference between a team that’s been running for two years and one that started last month shouldn’t just be seniority. It should be two years of accumulated learning. RRE is how you accumulate that learning deliberately instead of accidentally.

title: RRE: the weekly reflection framework I built for my team · DevOps Noldus
